description: Google Meet Studio GDM Component Catalog

gdm-stage-grid.description: Layout engine container for main stage panels.

focusedPanel.description: ID of the component to focus/maximize.

gdm-image-panel.description: Renders a static or generated image.

src.description: Absolute URL or asset path of the image.

gdm-video-panel.description: Embeds and plays video content (e.g. YouTube or video streams).

src.description: URL of the video embed source.

autoplay.description: Set to true to begin playback automatically.

src.description: URL of the web page to load.

gdm-diagram-view.description: Displays live, high-fidelity interactive D2 or SVG system architecture diagrams.

svg.description: Raw SVG markup or D2 rendering.

gdm-telemetry-dashboard.description: Renders tabbed metric views and interactive sparklines.

metrics.description: Metric telemetry objects with `label` (string) and `value` (string) fields.

gdm-radar-view.description: Dynamic interactive radar plot mapping flight paths and telemetry.

gdm-camera-panel.description: Displays a live camera / video feed frame.

frame.description: Data URL or image URL of the current camera frame (rendered to fill the panel).

src.description: Fallback poster/stream image URL used when `frame` is empty.

mirrored.description: Horizontally flip the image for self-view (default `true`).

gdm-terminal-panel.description: A developer terminal window showing command output.

content.description: Full terminal text, newline-separated (used when `lines` is empty).

cursor.description: Show a blinking block cursor after the last line (default `true`).

gdm-doc-panel.description: A document / file card with an optional call-to-action button.

url.description: Link the button opens; the button is hidden when empty.

gdm-container.description: A highly flexible layout container block supporting glassmorphism and nested compositions.

gap.description: CSS spacing gap between nested children (e.g. `"12px"`).

glass.description: Set to true to enable premium translucent backdrops.

scrollable.description: Enables vertical/horizontal scrollbars for overflowing contents.

reveal.description: Entrance animation played once on mount: `"fade-up"`, `"scale-in"`, `"slide-left"`, `"slide-right"`, `"blur-in"`, `"flip"`.

revealDelay.description: Seconds to delay the entrance — stagger across panels to choreograph a staged "set the stage" reveal.

columns.description: CSS column-count for automatic multi-column text or child element flow.

columnGap.description: CSS column-gap spacing (e.g., `"16px"`, defaults to gap or `"16px"`).

gdm-text.description: A rich typography component supporting sizes, colors, pulsing glow and weights.

size.description: Font size or preset (`"h1"`, `"h2"`, `"h3"`, `"body"`, `"caption"`, or custom `"16px"`).

flip.description: Animates each character with a flip when the content changes (for live values, clocks, prices).

gdm-grid.description: CSS-grid layout atom: arranges children in columns/rows. The structural partner to gdm-container.

columns.description: Grid columns: a number (→ equal columns) or a grid-template string (e.g. "2fr 1fr").

rows.description: Grid rows: a number or a grid-template string.

gdm-stat.description: Generic metric atom: a label, a large value, and an optional coloured delta/change pill.

label.description: Small uppercase label above the value.

unit.description: Small unit suffix on the value.

delta.description: Change figure shown in a caret pill (e.g. "+1.24%").

isUp.description: Direction of the delta (green up / red down).

accent.description: Optional CSS colour tint for the value.

gdm-image.description: Raw image atom (fit / radius / aspect-ratio). Lightweight sibling of gdm-image-panel.

gdm-spacer.description: Layout filler: grows to push siblings apart, or a fixed gap when sized.

size.description: Fixed size (e.g. "24px"); omit to grow and absorb free space.

gdm-badge.description: Status badge chip with dynamic neon color presets and pulsing indicators.

pulse.description: Enables a blinking live-status dot indicator.

gdm-progress.description: Glassmorphic linear progress bar or meter indicator.

color.description: Bar fill color name or custom CSS color.

animated.description: Enables flowing stripe patterns across the fill.

glow.description: Adds a neon glow filter around the filled progress track.

gdm-divider.description: Structural line divider with configurable layout margins and sizing.

vertical.description: Toggles vertical orientation instead of horizontal.

margin.description: CSS margin spacing around the divider.

gdm-icon.description: Interactive vector SVG icon selector containing a robust set of symbols.

color.description: Icon stroke color preset or custom Hex.

gdm-button.description: Interactive button element with two action modes: agent-bound (dispatches action event to the agent) or local-only (executes direct functions).

action.description: Action descriptor: `{"event": {"name": string, "context": object}}` for agent-bound, or `{"functionCall": {"call": string, "args": object}}` for local-only (calls: "openUrl", "navigateTab", "fireEndpoint").

targetUrl.description: Legacy shorthand for openUrl call — opens this URL in a new tab.

loading.description: Replaces label with a spinner; auto-set during fire-mode fetch.

gdm-clock.description: Digital clock and date widget with dynamic timezone configurations.

accentColor.description: Neon color style used for text shadowing and clock values.

color.description: Trend-line stroke color preset or custom Hex.

fill.description: Adds an elegant vertical backdrop area gradient under the sparkline.

gdm-table-view.description: Structured grid table for clear dashboard visualizations.

rows.description: Table row cells, containing numbers, strings, or formatted subtext cell objects.

accentColor.description: Theme color styling used for headers and lines.

gdm-trend-value.description: Compact financial ticker element with dynamic green/red direction trend arrows.

isUp.description: Explicitly override calculated positive arrow indicator.

precision.description: Decimal places to round the price value to.

gdm-scroller.description: Infinite ticker/marquee container wrapping nested child elements.

gdm-emoji-burst.description: Launches a burst of floating emoji reactions across the stage.

count.description: How many to spawn per burst (default `12`).

active.description: Toggle to trigger / show the burst.

gdm-draw-overlay.description: Renders freehand annotation strokes over the stage.

strokes.description: Stroke objects with `points` (array of `[x, y]` pairs, coordinates normalized 0–1), optional `color` (string) and `width` (number).

accentColor.description: is not used; per-stroke `color` defaults to the component `color` prop (default `#00f2ff`).

gdm-pointer.description: A laser-pointer dot for indicating positions on stage.

label.description: Small label shown beside the dot.

gdm-stage-card.description: Elegant glassmorphic title and body text message card.

gdm-chat-card.description: Glassmorphic bubble showcasing a participant's chat comment.

gdm-chyron.description: A classic lower-third banner for speaker names or key headlines.

accentColor.description: CSS color for the accent bar and glow (default `#00f2ff`).

titleColor.description: CSS color for the title text (default `#ffffff`).

subtitleColor.description: CSS color for the subtitle text (default `rgba(255,255,255,0.62)`).

bottom.description: Distance from bottom of screen in px (default `48`).

left.description: Distance from left of screen in px (default `40`).

gdm-ticker.description: Bottom scrolling ticker band across the stage screen.

badgeText.description: Label shown in the left badge (default `LIVE FEED`).

badgeColor.description: CSS color for the badge and dot (default `#ff0055`).

accentColor.description: CSS color for the top border accent (default `#00f2ff`).

textColor.description: CSS color for the scrolling text (default `rgba(255,255,255,0.95)`).

fontSize.description: Scrolling text font size in px (default `16`).

scrollSpeed.description: Scroll animation duration in seconds — lower = faster (default `35`).

gdm-standby-slate.description: High-fidelity intermission or standby screen with a countdown timer.

fullscreen.description: Stretch slate to cover the entire viewport.

gdm-captions.description: Lower-third live caption overlay — renders the current spoken/narrated line as a large centered pill, keeping the previous line faded above it so each point reads clearly one at a time. Use this to display captions compositionally via render_stage (preferred over the out-of-band transcript stream for agent-driven caption points).

text.description: The current caption line to display.

speaker.description: Speaker label shown above the line (default `"Speaker"`).

accentColor.description: CSS color for the speaker label (default `#00f2ff`).

gdm-transcript-view.description: Overlay displaying a real-time scrolling transcript log (avatar + role + text per turn), suited to a side log rather than lower-third captions.

gdm-mermaid-panel.description: Renders a Mermaid diagram from syntax (syntax, title, version).

gdm-html-panel.description: Renders a sandboxed HTML fragment as a panel or overlay (html, title, overlay, version).

gdm-3d-airspace.description: Interactive 3D tactical airspace / radar deck (flights, camera, glide-slope, terrain, orbit, auto-track).

gdm-3d-scene.description: Generic high-performance interactive 3D scene engine (points, links, camera, terrain, grid, fog).

gdm-market-ticker.description: Live global market-scan board: flip-clock time/date, market sections (a big spread of instruments), and an auto-highlighted 'ones to watch' movers strip.

gdm-theme-slider.description: Discrete 3-step theme selector for the AeroPulse GTM demo. Emits `aeropulse-theme-change` events on selection.

participantId.description: Participant space id for event routing.

order.description: JSON array of theme ids controlling display order.

gdm-media-review.description: Theme brand review panel: video preview + brief table for the AeroPulse GTM demo. Reacts to `aeropulse-theme-change` events.

videos.description: JSON map of theme_id → video URL.

briefMap.description: JSON map of theme_id → [{label, value}] brief items.

hideVideo.description: Hides video panel, shows brief only.

order.description: JSON array of theme ids controlling display order.

gdm-lock-trigger.description: Vote lock-in button for the AeroPulse GTM demo. Tracks current theme via events; fires lock endpoint on click.

spaceId.description: Participant space id — appended to the lock endpoint.

gdm-matrix-text.description: Matrix-style character scramble text. Letters decode left-to-right from random characters to the final string on mount.

framesPerChar.description: Number of scramble frames before each character settles (default `6`).

cursor.description: Show a blinking cursor after the text.

ext-button.description: Button with animated variants (shimmer, glowingRing, perimeterShimmer, bouncing, ringHover). Integrates with A2UI action protocol.

action.description: A2UI action: { functionCall: { call, args } } or { event: { name } }.

source.name: Extend UI
source.modifications: React state removed; children→text; onClick→action (A2UI protocol)

ext-badge.description: Inline status badge. Variants: default, secondary, destructive, outline.

variant.description: Visual style: default | secondary | destructive | outline.

ext-alert.description: Status alert banner. Variants: default, destructive.

source.name: Extend UI
source.modifications: Compound Alert/AlertTitle/AlertDescription collapsed to single component

ext-card.description: Content card with optional title, description, body, and footer. Collapses Card/CardHeader/CardContent/CardFooter into one component.

source.name: Extend UI
source.modifications: Compound React components collapsed into single Lit element; slot layout handled internally via CSS grid.

ext-checkbox.description: Accessible checkbox. Fires a2ui-action event on change.

action.description: A2UI action fired on change: { functionCall } or { event }.

source.name: Extend UI
source.modifications: onCheckedChange wired to a2ui-action event dispatch; Radix CheckboxPrimitive replaced with native input + custom styling.

ext-input.description: Text input with optional variants (default, filled, flushed). Fires a2ui-action on value commit (Enter / blur).

type.description: Input type: text | email | number | password | search.

action.description: A2UI action fired on Enter or blur.

source.name: Extend UI
source.modifications: Password toggle removed; React context replaced with direct Lit props; onChange/onBlur collapsed to action dispatch on commit.

ext-label.description: Accessible form label. Associates with an input via the for prop.

for.description: ID of the associated input element.

source.name: Extend UI
source.modifications: Radix Label.Root replaced with native label; className dropped

ext-switch.description: Toggle switch. Fires a2ui-action on change.

source.name: Extend UI
source.modifications: Radix Switch replaced with native button + CSS track/thumb; onCheckedChange wired to a2ui-action event dispatch.

ext-textarea.description: Multi-line text input. Fires a2ui-action on commit (blur or Ctrl+Enter).

action.description: A2UI action fired on blur or Ctrl+Enter.

source.name: Extend UI
source.modifications: React.forwardRef removed; onBlur/onChange collapsed to action dispatch on commit

ext-table.description: Data table with headers and row data passed as JSON arrays. Collapses Table/TableHeader/TableBody/TableRow/TableCell into one component.

headers.description: JSON array of column header strings. e.g. '["Name","Value"]'

rows.description: JSON array of row arrays. e.g. '[["Alice","100"],["Bob","200"]]'

source.name: Extend UI
source.modifications: Compound HTML table structure collapsed into single Lit element; data passed as JSON-serialisable headers + rows props.

ext-tabs.description: Tab navigation. Tabs defined as a JSON array of {id, label, content} objects.

tabs.description: JSON array of tab objects: [{id, label, content}].

action.description: A2UI action fired when active tab changes.

source.name: Extend UI
source.modifications: Radix Tabs compound (TabsList/TabsTrigger/TabsContent) collapsed into single Lit element; tabs data passed as JSON prop; onValueChange→action dispatch.
